prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2022年理科最低位次约55名，2025年物理类最低位次约52名，近两年基准位次稳定在52–55名区间，波动极小；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为9人，2025年扩至14人，2026年进一步扩至18人，较2025年扩招约28.6%，连续两年扩招使竞争面有所扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜全国第2名（2021–2026年稳定），中国最顶尖高校之一；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极高，报考关注度持续火热；历史投档异常记录中性，未见明显断档；拥有A+学科30余个（如数学、物理学、化学、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、应用经济学等），A-及以上学科超40个，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐；法学、经济学类偏热；本省考生总数2026年约37.79万人（较2025年物理类+历史类合计约28.57万人增加约32%），竞争基数显著扩大；北京大学位于北京（非本省），无本地招生倾斜；该校在云南招生占比极小（约0.1%–0.2%），跨省报考热度主要受学校层次驱动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次52名、2026年计划扩招至18人（扩招约28.6%使竞争加剧）、本省考生总数大幅增加约32%以及抖音高热关注度；扩招和考生增加的双重压力使位次数字略有后移，但北大顶尖地位对高分考生吸引力不减，预计最低位次约61名，区间41–81名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（元培）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学等）
- 工商管理类（金融学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、微电子）
- 物理学类（物理学、大气科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班类（理论与应用力学等）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）
- 化学类（化学、应用化学等）
- 环境科学（环境、健康、生态等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（41–81名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如40名以内）可重点冲击元培、计算机、数学等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如80名左右）应以三档专业保底，同时争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 55. In 2025, the minimum ranking for physics category was about 52. The baseline ranking has remained stable in the 52–55 range over the past two years, with minimal fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 9 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 14 in 2025, and further expanded to 18 in 2026, an increase of about 28.6% compared to 2025. The consecutive two-year expansion has broadened the competition pool.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 2nd nationally on the Soft Science Main Ranking (stable from 2021 to 2026), one of the top universities in China. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, and dormitory issues. Douyin popularity ranking: 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and sustained hot attention for applications. Historical admission anomaly records are neutral, with no obvious gaps. It has over 30 A+ disciplines (such as Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Applied Economics, etc.), and over 40 disciplines rated A- or above. The academic strength is top nationally and highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with social heat. Law and Economics are relatively hot. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 377,900 (an increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 285,700 for physics and history categories in 2025), significantly expanding the competition base. Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is extremely small (about 0.1%–0.2%), and cross-province application heat is mainly driven by the university's level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 52, the 2026 planned expansion to 18 students (an increase of about 28.6% intensifying competition), a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, and high Douyin attention; the dual pressure of expansion and increased candidates slightly shifts the ranking number backward, but Peking University's top status maintains strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. The estimated minimum ranking is about 61, with a range of 41–81.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
- Business Administration Class (Finance, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics Class (Economics, Finance, etc.)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics)
- Physics Class (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, etc.)
- Biological Science Class (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Chemistry Class (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, etc.)
- Environmental Science (Environment, Health, Ecology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (41–81), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 40), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Yuanpei, Computer Science, and Mathematics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 80), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety while striving for Tier 2 majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 2nd nationally on the Soft Science main list (stable from 2021–2026), one of China's top universities; reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, dormitory, etc.; Douyin popularity ranking 3rd (high heat), short video exposure extremely high, application attention continues to be hot; historical admission anomaly record neutral, no obvious gaps; has over 30 A+ disciplines (e.g., Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Sociology A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Journalism and Communication A-, etc.), liberal arts disciplines are top nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat is slightly hot, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese Language recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 377,900 (an increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of history category + physics category in 2025 of about 285,700), competition base significantly expanded; Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is extremely small, cross-province application heat is mainly driven by school level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 52, a slight expansion of the 2026 plan to 12 people (limited plan change), a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, and high Douyin attention; the plan change is small but the large increase in candidates slightly intensifies competition, Peking University's top status remains attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates, the minimum ranking is expected to be about 52, with a range of 32–72.
